product.name: Summer Infant Deluxe Stairway Simple to Secure Safety Pet and Baby Gate,30'-48' Wide, 32' Tall, Install on Wall or Banister in Doorway or Stairway,Hardware Mount, Auto Close Walk-Thru Door-Black Wood
product.description: Keep your loved ones safe and secure in style with the Ingenuity Stairway 48W Series Pet and Baby Gate. Measuring 32” tall, this black wood safety gate conveniently helps contain children and pets while complementing your home decor. It fits openings 30” to 48” wide and is specially designed to use at the top or bottom of stairs as well as hallways, with a locking indicator for added security. Use the comfort grip handled to open the extra-wide door the full width of the gate, making it easy to walk through with a no-threshold design that minimizes tripping. Over stairs, the door stopper helps prevent the door from swinging outward. This gate is easy to install using the included Precision Fit template, which helps ensure a successful installation with no measuring or unnecessary drill holes. Recommended tools for hardware installation (not included): drill, Phillips-head screwdriver, pencil. For a seamless installation, ensure that stairway handrails do not encroach on the site where you plan to mount the gate.
features: The Ingenuity Stairway 48W Series Dog, Toddler, and Baby Gate fits openings 30” to 48” wide and is 32" tall; please measure opening prior to purchase to ensure proper fit

Install on walls or flat banisters at top or bottom of stairs, hallways, and in doorways with included hardware kit; required tools for hardware installation (not included): drill, screwdriver, pencil
Use Precision Fit Template to ensure correct, easy installation, no measuring or unnecessary drill holes; narrowly spaced bars prevent babies, toddlers, and pets from squeezing through
Allows for easy one-handed release of the extra-wide door that opens the entire width of the gate; unique comfort grip handle; no-threshold design minimizes tripping
Be sure it's secure with the locking indicator and a support foot that provides extra stability; one-direction stops installed to prevent door from swinging outward over stairs
